panels.description: A massive, muscular Venom stands menacingly in the foreground against a backdrop of a futuristic city, a skyscraper with a Fantastic Four logo, and police helicopters under a starry sky.

page_summary: Cover: Venom looms large and menacingly over a cityscape, with the Baxter Building visible in the background under a starry sky and police helicopters patrolling the area.
